svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 18px; margin-left: 440px;

div.div: Q/K 决定每个 token 看哪里；V 是被注意力权重混合的内容。
